column1: # Art sprint fetch/process plan (docs/art-sprint-spec.md). Tier F — private build only, never ships.
# mode: cover (crop to fill) | contain (fit + pad: flat card-bg for /cards/, transparent for icons) | raw (copy untouched)
#       | cover_autocrop (crop to the art's content FIRST, then fit -- for splash/Wish sources that
#         float the figure in a transparent void; focus carries `cover|contain[@margin]`, default cover@0.06)
# focus: center | top; optional @ZOOM suffix (e.g. center@1.5) punches the crop into the frame (VFX gifs)
# pick: auto (rank 1 goes straight to `out`) | shortlist (all ranks render to art/candidates/<asset_id>/ for the contact sheet)
# source: png | gif (frame_pct = % through the clip) | svg (rendered; falls back to same-name .png)
# register (docs/art-taste-pass.md): sticker|item|vfx|tcg|splash|icon — the pick's art class; art_lint enforces
#   class rules on effective picks (no icon on cards, item=>contain, gif=>frame_pct, unique source+frame).
